title: Doormaker
move_pattern: What is it → Beam → Get Back In (repeats)
notes: Doormaker battles alongside a companion Door. The Get Back In move performs a powerful escape sequence: Doormaker damages the player, gains 5 Strength, then revives the Door (if available) and scales its Strength and HP based on how many times Doormaker has returned. Each return: Door's Strength is set to 4× the number of returns (ascension), and max HP is increased by 25× per return. Doormaker's visual appearance changes with each return.
